title: hesperis stricta
intro: Hesperis stricta, also known as the strict or tall phlox, is a perennial plant species belonging to the genus Hesperis in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and soothe sore throats. Hesperis stricta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
